attacking_style: Commits to long-range breakaway efforts, often staying away deep into finales (10km and closer). Shows willingness to animate races from distance rather than late tactical strikes.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team setup patterns. Appears to operate with autonomy in breakaway situations.
terrain_preference: Demonstrates ability to survive varied terrain in extended efforts. Lacks finishing punch in reduced sprint situations, suggesting mid-mountain or attritional stages suit better than flat sprint finishes.
vulnerability: Exposed in tactical sprint scenarios after long efforts - outmaneuvered by more patient finishers despite making the selection. Struggles to convert breakaway presence into victories.
key_patterns: Actively joins and animates long-range breakaways, sustaining efforts into race finales (2 observations)
Reaches final selections but loses in sprint tactics to sharper finishers (2 observations)
Commits energy throughout the day rather than conserving for finale (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data and temporal gap between observations (2017-2020) prevents meaningful trajectory assessment
